howItWorks.intro: This quilt binding calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Binding Length
rules.explanation: Perimeter plus extra for corners and joins.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.a: 2.5 inches is standard for double-fold binding, giving a 3/8 inch finished edge.

faq.q: How much extra should I add?
faq.a: Add 10-12 inches to the perimeter for joining strips and turning corners.

howWeCalculate.intro: This quilt binding calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs
Results are calculated instantly in your browser — nothing is sent to a server
